response.justification: Aisha demonstrates extensive full-stack experience across diverse systems, with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java). Her background includes scalable backend work, frontend development, cloud platforms (AWS), and testing frameworks, with clear contributions to architecture and performance. AI-agent infrastructure experience further matches emerging role requirements.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise with 9+ years of progressive responsibility
Proven track record in scaling high-throughput systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby)
Direct experience with required stack (TypeScript/Node/React) and cloud/AI agent technologies
concerns: Primary stack experience is concentrated in TypeScript ecosystem, with limited exposure to Nest.js
No explicit mention of Vitest or PostgreSQL in recent projects
Open-source contributions show diversity but may lack depth in enterprise-grade tooling
